summary: Possible name confusion with multer/express ecosystem packages
details: Package name 'multer-express' is similar to the widely used 'multer' middleware for Express. No malicious code patterns, install-time hooks, or exfiltration behaviors were identified in the package contents. Name-similarity alone is a subjective signal and may indicate an unrelated derivative, fork, or beginner package rather than an attack. Routing to human review for name-confusion assessment.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
